b2426e27f188a9ec.label: Deeds carry natural consequences
b2426e27f188a9ec.desc: Wrongdoing inevitably produces suffering while righteousness brings reward.

4a80141052dab007.label: Constant practice brings stability
4a80141052dab007.desc: Persistent dedication to spiritual and moral practice creates unshakeable inner peace.

f01cd72eebcb986a.label: Followers show varied ambitions
f01cd72eebcb986a.desc: Different people have distinct goals and varying commitment levels toward their leaders and teachings.

761e0c2e221e8679.label: Power flows from humility
761e0c2e221e8679.desc: True leadership and influence arise from inner virtue, humility, and non-assertion rather than force.

2dba3873152136ce.label: Guard your own mind
2dba3873152136ce.desc: Protect your thoughts and focus on controlling your actions rather than trying to control external events or others.

c2ca88f8ab000218.label: Divine judgment awaits wrongdoing
c2ca88f8ab000218.desc: Those who commit wrongs or reject divine guidance will inevitably face judgment and punishment.

2c2561acc08bb35b.label: Stewardship requires justice
2c2561acc08bb35b.desc: Those entrusted with responsibility must manage it fairly and extend mercy to others as they have received it.

4c4ce2fbfc28b241.label: Virtue brings lasting reward
4c4ce2fbfc28b241.desc: Righteousness, hard work, and virtue consistently produce protection, respect, and lasting benefit, while wickedness leads to ruin.

646ae9378ceb5683.label: Death makes all equal
646ae9378ceb5683.desc: Everyone eventually dies and is forgotten regardless of achievement or status, making posthumous fame meaningless.

151f9483752c6563.label: Virtue brings true happiness
151f9483752c6563.desc: Happiness arises from living righteously, accepting what is natural, and acting justly with good intentions.

9d5d869f3346bfff.label: Truth transcends material reality
9d5d869f3346bfff.desc: Spiritual wisdom requires moving beyond ordinary knowledge and material attachments to perceive eternal transcendent reality.

f37a0245bd7291e7.label: Fulfill duties with reason
f37a0245bd7291e7.desc: Perform your responsibilities with clear thinking and virtue while maintaining awareness and not being overwhelmed by circumstances.

abbcb164eea6e352.label: Character shows through action
abbcb164eea6e352.desc: True character demonstrates itself through virtuous conduct aligned with principle, not merely by avoiding wrongdoing.

ac4148c91bae2c65.label: Work without attached reward
ac4148c91bae2c65.desc: Spiritual freedom comes from performing your duties diligently without attachment to personal benefits or outcomes.

7a93b9998444333d.label: Lead through moral example
7a93b9998444333d.desc: Effective leaders gain loyalty and sustain their communities through practicing virtue and setting a good example.

608b6f6b476d3ed5.label: Wisdom succeeds, foolishness fails
608b6f6b476d3ed5.desc: Wise discernment and humility lead to success and favor, while foolishness, arrogance, and emotional reactivity invite failure and ruin.

739bcd04e6fbc5c1.label: All existence ends in death
739bcd04e6fbc5c1.desc: All material beings and possessions eventually decay and die, rendering worldly pursuits and attachments ultimately meaningless.

b64050480cfb0312.label: Trust God's guidance and law
b64050480cfb0312.desc: Divine guidance is trustworthy, and following it requires personal accountability and forgiveness for spiritual integrity.

5f8bca45d4f0535f.label: Greed blinds and destroys
5f8bca45d4f0535f.desc: Unchecked greed for wealth blinds people to their mortality and inevitably leads to ruin and decay.

d7b385c563b2faf9.label: Wisdom exceeds all material wealth
d7b385c563b2faf9.desc: Wisdom, integrity, and understanding truth surpass any material possessions, status, or external wealth.

f9fb7a7574de6989.label: Authentic virtue hides its nature
f9fb7a7574de6989.desc: True virtue may involve withdrawing from power or appearing inactive, and the deepest virtue goes unrecognized because people misunderstand its true motivations.

2937f43efbc21dcf.label: Consciousness grounds all experience
2937f43efbc21dcf.desc: Reality unfolds through layers from physical sensations and matter through mental faculties to the Self as the unified conscious ground of all being.

0dbefde112c6ab54.label: Character reveals itself through action
0dbefde112c6ab54.desc: Your character is revealed by your actions, not your words or intentions, and small influences can transform the whole.

7e53a8126c02a2f2.label: Rejecting truth brings certain destruction
7e53a8126c02a2f2.desc: Those who reject divine signs, warnings, and guidance inevitably face destruction in both this world and the afterlife.

ee4347ebf4d36278.label: God is all-powerful and all-knowing
ee4347ebf4d36278.desc: God possesses absolute power and knowledge, created all things, and deserves exclusive worship as the only being worthy of devotion.

e62a9d6c9eb38c03.label: Live by reason and duty
e62a9d6c9eb38c03.desc: Fulfill your natural duty to act virtuously according to reason and serve the common good regardless of others' disapproval or your perceived insignificance.

4671770469bc1aba.label: Spiritual readiness transcends material goods
4671770469bc1aba.desc: Death is inevitable and only sincere spiritual preparation matters; material accumulation cannot protect against mortality.

accfe531c2a1df7e.label: Arrogance and ingratitude destroy
accfe531c2a1df7e.desc: Arrogant rejection of truth, ingratitude for abundance, and misapplied moral rules rooted in delusion inevitably cause self-destruction.

e960b12b60d842f7.label: Virtue and integrity build character
e960b12b60d842f7.desc: Genuine virtue, integrity, and right conduct rooted in sincere commitment earn respect and lasting satisfaction.

65c8c908cd0a4751.label: Detachment from desire liberates
65c8c908cd0a4751.desc: Freedom from all craving, attachment, and desire eliminates grief and fear, leading to enlightenment and peace.

f57ff38fb00de8b2.label: Rational universal order
f57ff38fb00de8b2.desc: The universe operates as one rational, harmonious whole where all events serve a unified cosmic purpose.

912f6dc279a88313.label: Reason governs practice
912f6dc279a88313.desc: Reason must govern over bodily concerns and daily distractions to maintain philosophical and moral integrity.

5063fbc6212503cb.label: Leadership through integrity
5063fbc6212503cb.desc: Effective leaders maintain harmony through personal virtue and restraint rather than force, edicts, or ostentatious display.

bda08eb8d8d78aa2.label: Honoring parents
bda08eb8d8d78aa2.desc: Treating parents with consistent respect, reverence, and proper ceremony is a fundamental human duty.

ae44c28dc84c39fc.label: Knowledge liberates from rebirth
ae44c28dc84c39fc.desc: Direct knowledge of consciousness as distinct from material nature brings liberation from suffering and death.

df63da306066aa28.label: Virtue surpasses indulgence
df63da306066aa28.desc: True pleasure comes from virtue and freedom from disturbance, not from pursuing sensual excess.

6874b108b91c69f4.label: Judgment controls suffering
6874b108b91c69f4.desc: Suffering stems from your judgment about events, not the events themselves; control your mind for peace.

849ed2a2ec9c6878.label: Faith requires action
849ed2a2ec9c6878.desc: Sincere faith in God combined with righteous action and generosity brings genuine security and divine reward.

4b65927c2ab27e0c.label: Discipline brings inner peace
4b65927c2ab27e0c.desc: Mastery over emotions and desires through meditation and controlled living leads to lasting equanimity.

9ec9d137e5b05452.label: Indulgence breeds suffering
9ec9d137e5b05452.desc: Lack of self-restraint and moral discipline traps people in endless cycles of harm and degradation.

931d146603ec3a4c.label: Eternal consciousness pervades all
931d146603ec3a4c.desc: An eternal, pure consciousness underlies all existence as the unchanging, transcendent ground of being.

2615963e929b1a68.label: Protect your integrity
2615963e929b1a68.desc: Maintain your principles by disregarding others' judgment, values, and actions except where duty requires.

820adfd56491a3ae.label: Female power and character
820adfd56491a3ae.desc: Women wield significant influence through either virtuous industry and wisdom or through seduction and cunning.

7c5317cb9e08e17d.label: Self-correction before judgment
7c5317cb9e08e17d.desc: Correct your own character and live by your principles before judging or criticizing others.

ac4e0283c0ea66fb.label: Spiritual purpose first
ac4e0283c0ea66fb.desc: Spiritual fulfillment and service to the divine should take priority over material possessions and self-reliance.

d682741e2437232b.label: Divine reward for righteousness
d682741e2437232b.desc: The righteous receive eternal paradise as divine reward while the wicked face eternal punishment.

8f40c4895b125b99.label: Wisdom brings fulfillment
8f40c4895b125b99.desc: Pursuing wisdom leads to life, good judgment, health, and lasting fulfillment.

9eb0387a29670f67.label: Spiritual practice enables transcendence
9eb0387a29670f67.desc: Dedicated spiritual practice leads to liberation from suffering and transcendence of death.

afb24a70cd049e02.label: Desire prevents enlightenment
afb24a70cd049e02.desc: Uncontrolled desire and worldly preoccupation are the primary obstacles to spiritual awakening and wisdom.

28251cd33adeaf57.label: Ultimate reality pervades everything
28251cd33adeaf57.desc: The ultimate reality simultaneously transcends and pervades all existence while sustaining all creation.

2d53ef2f41d69695.label: Accept death without fear
2d53ef2f41d69695.desc: Death should be accepted naturally and calmly as an inevitable part of life without resistance.

b6c586fabea38c08.label: Faith and righteousness bring vindication
b6c586fabea38c08.desc: Sincere faith and righteous action lead to divine reward and vindication despite hardship or opposition.

433b225ef38b7874.label: Respond to harm with kindness
433b225ef38b7874.desc: When wronged, respond with compassion and gentle teaching rather than retaliation or judgment.

5bd90818230a7276.label: All things are constantly changing
5bd90818230a7276.desc: Everything is subject to continuous change and impermanence, making attachment to particular things pointless.

d40fcbf815b210a2.label: Virtue surpasses circumstance
d40fcbf815b210a2.desc: Virtuous people naturally excel and elevate others regardless of circumstance, while petty people decline.

e95f5a6ce545ea11.label: People resist understanding
e95f5a6ce545ea11.desc: Many people refuse or fail to understand truth due to hardened hearts, familiarity, or lack of genuine commitment.

b013dce9b37202df.label: Inner virtue stays undisturbed
b013dce9b37202df.desc: True virtue lies in maintaining justice and purity of mind regardless of external circumstances or suffering.

2a65dd0f2bef9766.label: Learning transforms character
2a65dd0f2bef9766.desc: True learning requires an enlightened teacher and a receptive student willing to practice and transform through lived virtue.

4b774eb962d6373f.label: Virtue matters more than appearance
4b774eb962d6373f.desc: Genuine virtue is the only thing truly worthy of respect; external possessions and appearance have no real value.

c711e48bc1980fe2.label: God will resurrect and judge
c711e48bc1980fe2.desc: God has the power to resurrect the dead and will judge all people on the day of resurrection.
